title: elaeocarpus howii
intro: Elaeocarpus howii, also known as the Chinese Elaeocarpus or How's Elaeocarpus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Elaeocarpaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Elaeocarpus howii include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating various infections. Elaeocarpus howii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used to support overall health and well-being.
